common.footer_brand_desc: Contemporary Neapolitan pizza, signature cocktails and an experience in Vitacura, Santiago de Chile.

home.espiritu_title: More than a pizzeria. A place where things happen.
home.espiritu_p1: Segreta was born in a garage, with real fire and a simple obsession: make an incredible Neapolitan pizza and experience it differently. What began as passion and technique is now a meeting point where tables are shared, glasses linger and every visit has the potential to become a great night.
home.espiritu_p2: Signature pizzas, carefully selected ingredients, cocktails and an atmosphere that invites you to arrive without rush and stay longer than planned. Because at Segreta, gastronomy is not just food — it is experience, energy and people connecting.
home.esp_pizza_desc: Italian tradition elevated with modern technique and creative freedom, respecting the magic of a well-hydrated dough and the intense heat of the Neapolitan oven.
home.esp_cocteles_desc: Artisanal cocktails with premium spirits and contemporary mixology techniques that match the rhythm and experience of Segreta.
home.esp_ambiente_desc: A warm, intimate space full of energy. Where tables are shared and glasses linger, located on the best corner of Santiago's east side.
home.frase: Easy to come in. Not so easy to leave early...
home.cta_title: Coming back was always part of the plan
home.cta_desc: Reserve your table or book your next event with us.

nosotros.historia_p1: Some stories begin with a recipe; ours began with a wood-fired oven built by hand in a garage. Through fire, flour and long conversations, we understood that we were not just making pizza — we were crafting an experience defined by respect for time, dedication to detail and a constant pursuit of quality. What started from intuition and passion soon grew beyond the garage.
nosotros.historia_p2: That gave rise to our events chapter, guided by a principle that has always stayed with us: "We'll see each other in the best places." Festivals, weddings, fairs and private celebrations became natural stages for taking our kitchen further and building our own identity — where fire brought people together and created memorable moments.
nosotros.historia_p3: In time, the next step became inevitable. After visiting the best places, we decided to create our own. That is how Segreta was born on Alonso de Córdova — a space that gathers the artisanal spirit of the garage, the experience of the events, and an unwavering commitment to offering more than great food. Today, Segreta is a meeting point where our ever-evolving kitchen and cocktail bar are the starting point for people to gather, share and build new stories around the table.
nosotros.cita: "Come for the pizza. Stay for everything else."
nosotros.familia_p1: Behind every table, every pizza and every cocktail, there are people. The Segreta Family is made up of hosts, waitstaff, kitchen and management who understand that the experience does not end on the plate — it begins with the welcome and is built in every detail.
nosotros.familia_p2: We believe in hospitality as an essential part of our identity. In a close, attentive and genuine service. In a team that works with passion so that every visit feels different, yet always familiar.
nosotros.pago_desc: At Segreta we want every guest to enjoy the experience without friction. That is why we have expanded our payment methods to welcome visitors from Brazil and the corporate world of Vitacura.
nosotros.pago_pix_desc: We accept Pix payments at all opening hours. Pay instantly from your Brazilian bank and enjoy Segreta just like home.
nosotros.pago_amipass_desc: We accept Amipass payments during lunch hours, from 13:00 to 16:00, Tuesday to Thursday. Made for the corporate world to enjoy a memorable lunch.

exp.hero_desc: Discover our special activations, exclusive events and experiences designed to create unforgettable moments.
exp.activaciones_desc: At Segreta, there are no ordinary days. Every evening has its own identity and is designed to turn a simple night out into a unique experience.
exp.lunes_desc: Before you order, roll the dice: you could win 50% off on Whisky Sour, Wine, Cocktail, a free Pizza… or nothing. A playful, unexpected experience.
exp.lunes_regla: Rule: Follow @segretapizzeria on Instagram, film yourself rolling the dice and post it tagging Segreta if you win.
exp.martes_desc: All women are welcome to the table with a complimentary signature cocktail to start the evening right.
exp.martes_regla: Rule: Must be a woman and order something at Segreta to receive one complimentary cocktail — not repeatable or exchangeable.
exp.miercoles_desc: Experience the Social Semaphore every Wednesday. First choose your social mood: 🟢 Social, 🟡 Low Profile or 🔴 Not participating; then play, break the ice — and if the chemistry flows between tables: complimentary shots!
exp.miercoles_regla: Rule: One token per table to achieve a match.
exp.viernes_desc: Every Friday after office we welcome you with a "Well-Deserved Unwind" — a complimentary 330cc Royal Guard to close the week in style.
exp.viernes_regla: Rule: Order something from the menu at Segreta.
exp.sabado_desc: The best Saturday combo: live music and the finest Licor 43 promotions to enjoy golden hour like it deserves.
exp.sabado_regla: Rule: Order something from the menu at Segreta.
exp.domingo_desc: Sundays with live bossa nova music, a relaxed atmosphere and a special Tanqueray Bossa Nova Gin cocktail menu to enjoy the afternoon without rushing.
exp.domingo_regla: Rule: Order something from the menu at Segreta.
exp.eventos_desc: At Segreta we host all kinds of events: exclusive birthday parties, brand activations, special tastings, themed parties and corporate dinners. Every event is tailor-made, both on-site and off-site.
exp.en_segreta_p1: At Segreta we have spaces designed for every type of celebration. The first-floor terrace is the ideal stage for social events with energy and atmosphere, while for more private and exclusive gatherings we offer the new Camera Segreta and the entire second floor with full personalisation options.
exp.en_segreta_p2: Birthdays, intimate celebrations, corporate events, launches and brand activations find the perfect space here to become a memorable experience.
exp.fuera_p1: The Segreta experience doesn't stay within these walls. We take it wherever you need. Our mobile cart, cocktail bars and gastronomic production are designed to transform businesses, fairs, festivals and brand launches into true meeting points.
exp.fuera_p2: With collaborative branding, on-site activations and tailor-made proposals, we turn every space into an authentic extension of Segreta: great energy, high-standard cuisine and a presentation that does not go unnoticed.
exp.club_p1: When you sign up for the Segreta Pizzería program, you earn points with every purchase using your Segreta "Red Pass" Card.
exp.club_p2: As you reach certain levels, you move up in card tier while unlocking exclusive rewards and benefits you can redeem at the restaurant.
exp.frase: "We'll see each other in the best places."
exp.celebra_desc: Contact us and organise your birthday, corporate event or private celebration at Segreta.
exp.form_success: We received your message. The events team will be in touch shortly.

partners.intro_p1: The Segreta experience is not built alone. Behind every cocktail, every pizza and every memorable night, there is a network of partner brands, suppliers of excellence and strategic partners who share our obsession for quality and detail.
partners.intro_p2: Each of our partners has been carefully selected: from the distilleries that supply us with the finest spirits, to the wineries that choose the wines that accompany our menu. From the beverage brands that elevate our bar, to the premium ingredients that make every creation from our kitchen possible.
partners.intro_p3: This is not just about supplying a restaurant. It is about co-creating an experience. Our partners understand that at Segreta every product has a purpose, every brand has a place and every collaboration adds to the standard that defines us. Together, we make every visit unique, authentic and unforgettable.
partners.main_title: Brands that are part of us
partners.contacto_desc: We are always open to meeting new quality suppliers, experienced investors and brands that share our vision. If you have a product, service or proposal that can add to the Segreta DNA, we want to hear from you.
partners.form_empresa_ph: Name of your company or project
partners.form_mensaje_ph: Describe your proposal, product or service.
partners.form_success: We received your proposal. We will be in touch if there is an opportunity to work together.
